title: Mojtaba Khamenei 'largely inaccessible' — only IRGC commanders have direct line
snippet: With Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei largely inaccessible, only IRGC commanders maintain direct communication, consolidating Vahidi's position as de facto ruler. Civilian officials have no direct access.
tag_reason: New detail on Mojtaba Khamenei's inaccessibility and IRGC monopoly on communication with Supreme Leader
